description_long: This object is a small memorial shrine or grave marker set within a dark, arched alcove structure. At its center stands a stylized angel statue with outstretched wings, positioned on a circular pedestal. Flanking the angel on both sides are shelves holding small figurines and framed photographs, suggesting a place for remembrance and offerings. The alcove is constructed with a stone-like, faceted exterior and a green base, evoking the look of a graveyard monument. The rear of the structure is solid and unadorned, while the front is open, allowing access to the angel and memorial items. The overall design is somber and respectful, suitable for a cemetery or memorial park.
description: A small arched graveyard shrine with an angel statue, shelves of figurines, and framed photos, set on a green base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angel statue, shelves with figurines, and framed photos inside the arched alcove.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the alcove and a partial glimpse of the shelves and figurines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, faceted back of the alcove with no visible details or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the alcove's thickness and a partial look at the shelves.
